## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] Docs / planning
- [ ] Agent rule / handoff update

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are public-safe (no private details exposed)
- [ ] README, CHANGELOG, or status docs updated if needed
- [ ] Consistent with ecosystem-standards
